title: Chronicles of Infinity
emptyNpcs: You haven't met anyone significant yet.
jumpToSegmentPrompt: Enter segment ID or number to jump to:
storyNotStarted: The story hasn't started yet. Click below to begin your adventure.
error: The connection to the universe was interrupted... (API Error, please try again)

veoScript.title: Veo Script Generation
veoScript.error: Failed to generate script. Please try again.

0.name: Interpreting Image
0.desc: Analyzing the uploaded image to inspire the story world

0: Discovering the world hidden in pixels...
Letting the image speak its story...
1: Establishing the laws of magic and nature...
Shaping mountains, rivers, and forgotten ruins...
Defining the boundaries between light and shadow...
2: Inscribing hidden traits and secret powers...
Forging bonds of fate and fortune...
Setting the stage for legendary deeds...
3: Populating realms with wonders and dangers...
4: Weaving the web of alliances and enmities...
5: Inscribing quests in the book of fate...
Setting the cosmic clock in motion...
10: The wheels of fate begin to turn...
Your story is about to begin...

errors.retryWithProgress: You have progress saved from phase {{phase}}. Would you like to resume from where you left off?

missingApiKey: Missing API Key. Please configure settings.
confirmNewGame: Are you sure you want to start a new game? All progress will be lost.
confirmRebuildContext: Are you sure you want to rebuild the story context? This will summarize the current history and clear the AI's memory cache. Use this if the story becomes slow or the AI gets confused.
confirmRetry: Are you sure you want to retry? This will regenerate the current turn's content.
confirmCleanupEntities: Are you sure you want to cleanup entities? This will clean up invalid or duplicate entities (characters, items, locations) from the game state.
startQuote: Every choice ripples through infinity. Where will your story begin?
customContextPlaceholder: E.g., 'I am a detective in 1920s Shanghai' or 'A dragon reborn as a human'.

customGame.title: Custom Game
customGame.subtitle: Fill in your world and rules (optional), then start immediately.
customGame.tip: Leave anything blank — the AI will fill gaps and keep it consistent.

placeholders.title: e.g., Echoes of the Clockwork City
placeholders.worldSetting: Where/when is this? What powers, factions, and taboos exist?
placeholders.protagonistRole: e.g., exiled prince, street mage, rookie detective...
placeholders.premise: What kicks off the story? What do you want to chase or protect?
placeholders.narrativeStyle: e.g., gritty noir, lyrical epic, comedic and fast-paced...
placeholders.gameplayFocus: Add details: exploration-heavy, tactical combat, political intrigue, slow-burn romance...
placeholders.contentBoundaries: Avoid list + boundaries: e.g., no sexual violence, no harm to children, no torture; fade-to-black for explicit content...
placeholders.rules: Any hard rules, limits, or special mechanics? (Optional)
placeholders.openingScene: Describe the very first scene you want to start with. (Optional)

gameplay.hint: Set weights (0–100). Higher means stronger focus. Total doesn't need to be 100.

embedding.title: RAG Embedding
embedding.description: Enable semantic search for story context retrieval
embedding.topKHelp: Number of similar results to retrieve
embedding.statusInfo: Embeddings will be generated when story content is created. This enables semantic search for relevant context during story generation.
embedding.noModelsAvailable: No embedding models available, please check provider settings.
embedding.noApiKey: Provider has no API key configured
embedding.noAvailableProvidersDesc: No providers are available for embedding. Please go to the Providers tab to enable at least one provider and configure its API key.
embedding.notSet: No embedding model has been set.

settings.title: Settings
settings.modelNotFound: Model not found in list. Please select a valid model.

extra.title: Extra Settings
extra.detailedDescriptionHelp: Force AI to generate more detailed, sensory-rich descriptions for characters and environments.
extra.narrativeStylePresetHelp: Add a concise style add-on to the theme default. Per-game <narrative_style> in custom context overrides this.
extra.worldDispositionPresetHelp: Add an explicit baseline for human nature and social tone (supplement to theme, not a replacement). Per-game <world_disposition> in custom context overrides this.
extra.playerMalicePresetHelp: Add a concrete, playable bias for malicious/criminal play (trace, heat, counterplay, escalation). Supplement only; does not force the player. Per-game <player_malice_profile> in custom context overrides this.
extra.playerMaliceIntensityHelp: Controls Trace/Heat accumulation and how quickly counterplay escalates. Light = more room to maneuver; Heavy = faster scrutiny and escalation. Per-game <player_malice_intensity> in custom context overrides this.
extra.nsfwHelp: Enable adult/explicit content generation. This will produce mature content.
extra.toolCallCarouselHelp: Show a rotating tool-call style loading animation (e.g., vfs_read({...})) while AI is generating.
extra.genderPreferenceHelp: Force the protagonist's gender when generating stories.
extra.promptInjectionHelp: When enabled, this player instruction can shape style, plot direction, setting assumptions, and world-rule bias.
extra.customPromptInjectionHelp: Write style, plot direction, setting assumptions, or world-rule bias here.
extra.customPromptInjectionPlaceholder: e.g., Use concise modern Chinese; keep a noir tone; avoid long lists.
extra.systemDefaultInjectionEnabledHelp: When enabled, a matched `[[system_prompts]]` entry from local `src/prompt/prompt.toml` is injected at the front with runtime floor (order: runtime floor → system default → user custom → system instruction).
extra.forceAutoToolChoiceHelp: Always use 'auto' for tool choice, overriding 'required' requests. Improves compatibility for some models.
extra.agenticLoopHelp: Configure the behavior of AI agentic loop execution.
extra.maxAgenticRoundsHelp: Maximum number of rounds for agentic loop (default: 20)
extra.clearerSearchToolHelp: Return detailed tool metadata (description, schema) in search results to help AI discovery.
extra.maxToolCallsHelp: Maximum total tool calls per agentic loop (default: 50)
extra.resetTutorialsHelp: Show onboarding tutorials again on next visit
extra.disablePlayerProfilingHelp: When enabled, AI will not record/use cross-save player psychology data.
extra.resetPlayerProfileHelp: Clear all recorded cross-save player psychology data.

welcome.title: Welcome!
welcome.content: Welcome to Chronicles of Infinity! This quick guide will help you set up AI providers and start your adventure.

openSettings.title: Open Settings
openSettings.content: Click the settings icon to configure your AI provider.

addProvider.title: Add AI Provider
addProvider.content: Click 'Add Provider' to open the setup dialog.

completeProvider.title: Configure Provider
completeProvider.content: Select a provider (e.g., Google Gemini), enter your API key, and click 'Add'. Then click Next.

modelsTab.title: Select Models
modelsTab.content: Click the 'Models' tab to configure your story model.

selectModel.title: Choose Story Model
selectModel.content: Select a Story Model from the dropdown (e.g., gemini-2.0-flash). Then click Next.

closeSettings.title: Setup Complete!
closeSettings.content: Close settings to start your adventure!

chooseTheme.title: Start Your Adventure
chooseTheme.content: Choose a theme to begin your story! Each theme offers a unique world to explore.

storyFeed.title: Story Feed
storyFeed.content: Your narrative unfolds here. Each segment contains AI-generated story and choices.

sidebar.title: Character & World
sidebar.content: The left sidebar shows your inventory, relationships, quests, and world knowledge.

timeline.title: Timeline
timeline.content: The right panel tracks your journey's history and important events.

actionInput.title: Take Action
actionInput.content: Choose from suggested actions or type your own commands. Be creative!

menu.title: Game Menu
menu.content: Access settings, save management, and other options through the menu.

models.storyHelp: Used for narrative logic, inventory, and translations.
models.scriptHelp: Used for generating cinematic scripts for Veo.
models.audioHelp: Used for reading story text aloud.
models.loreHelp: Used for generating item descriptions and lore.
models.autoCompactEnabledHelp: Automatically compact the session when context usage exceeds a threshold (recommended for prefix cache stability).
models.autoCompactThresholdHelp: Trigger compaction when last prompt token usage / context window >= this threshold.
models.maxContextTokensHelp: Optional manual override for the current Story provider+model pair. If unset, the system prefers provider metadata, then built-in model defaults, then 32k fallback.
models.maxContextTokensDesignNote: Context window overrides are now scoped per provider+model to avoid cross-provider mismatches.
models.contextDefaultsCopied: Model context defaults copied to clipboard
models.contextDefaultsCopyFailed: Failed to copy model context defaults
models.learnedContextMapCopied: Learned context map copied to clipboard
models.learnedContextMapCopyFailed: Failed to copy learned context map
models.resetLearnedContextDone: Adaptive learned context for current model has been reset
models.resetAllLearnedContextConfirm: Reset adaptive learned context for all models ({{count}} entries)? This cannot be undone.
models.resetAllLearnedContextDone: Adaptive learned context has been reset for all models
models.imageTimeoutHelp: Maximum wait time for image generation (in seconds)
models.batchUpdateError: Failed to update models, please try again.
models.batchUpdatePrompt: Whether to apply this model to story generation, lore generation, translation and Veo script generation?
models.topKHelp: Limits vocabulary to top K tokens
models.disableFilterHelp: Show all models regardless of capability detection. Use with caution.
models.disableFilterWarning:
⚠️ WARNING ⚠️

Disabling model filter will show ALL models regardless of their capabilities.

Selecting an incompatible model may cause generation to fail.

Are you sure you want to proceed?

customTips: Add details to guide your adventure's story
customWritingTips: Describe characters, settings, plot hooks, or themes you'd like to explore. The AI will incorporate these elements into your story.

disableEnvironmentalEffectsDesc: Disable visual weather effects like rain, snow, and fog
typewriterSpeedDesc: Speed of the typewriter effect for new story text.

commands.confirmDescription: Please review this command before continuing.

godMode.enableSummary: All actions will succeed and world consistency constraints become permissive.
godMode.disableSummary: Return to normal success/failure logic and standard world constraints.
godMode.confirmEnable:
⚠️ GOD MODE ⚠️

This will enable God Mode where:
• All your actions succeed
• All NPCs believe you unconditionally
• You can change world rules and logic

This may significantly impact game balance.

Are you sure you want to enable God Mode?
godMode.confirmDisable: Disable God Mode and return to normal gameplay?

unlock.title: Unlock Hidden Information
unlock.summary: Reveal hidden traits, motives, and secret state across the current world.
unlock.confirm:
⚠️ UNLOCK ALL ⚠️

This will reveal ALL hidden information:
• Item secrets and true nature
• NPC true personalities and motives
• Location hidden features
• Quest true objectives
• Knowledge hidden truths

This cannot be undone and may spoil the story.

Are you sure?

sudo.title: Force World Update
sudo.summary: Apply a direct world instruction that bypasses normal progression checks.
sudo.confirm:
⚠️ SUDO ⚠️

You are about to force the following change:
"{{prompt}}"

This will bypass standard game logic and consistency checks.

Are you sure?

commands.help:
Available Commands:
/god - Toggle God Mode (all actions succeed, NPCs obey)
/unlock - Reveal all hidden information
/edit - Open GameState editor
/help - Show this help message

cang_yuan_tu.name: Azure Legacy (Cang Yuan Tu)
cang_yuan_tu.narrativeStyle:
[Core Style]: High-octane action, humanity's war song, God-Demon cultivation, fast-paced combat.
[World View]: The human world is invaded by the Demon Race. Three major sects (Archean Mountain, Black Sand Grotto-Heaven, Two World Island) lead the resistance. Cultivation system: God-Demon system (Mortal - God-Demon - Great Solar - Dark Star - Inorganic - Creation - Emperor). Emphasizes extreme 'speed' and 'saber arts'.
[Culture]: Humanity's resilience in desperation. Generations of God-Demons dying to protect mortal cities. Painting Dao: entering the Dao through painting.
[Writing Guidelines]: Combat descriptions must be extremely fast, emphasizing 'lightning speed'. Protagonist is determined, willing to sacrifice everything to slay demons.
cang_yuan_tu.backgroundTemplate:
[World Background]: Azure Legacy World. The Demon Race invades through World Entrances. Humanity is in peril. You are a young genius from [Dongning Prefecture], practicing saber arts since childhood, determined to become a God-Demon and protect your home. Your father is the clan leader, and your mother went missing during a demon invasion (actually a God-Demon).
[Current Situation]: You are participating in the entrance exam for [Archean Mountain], the supreme cultivation holy land. You must stand out, inherit the God-Demon legacy, and embark on a path of blood and fire to slay demons.
cang_yuan_tu.example: A flash of saber light, too fast to even see the afterimage. The Second Firmament Demon King attempting a sneak attack didn't even have time to scream before its head flew high, foul demon blood splashing onto the broken city wall. You sheathe your saber, eyes cold as ice, lightning crackling around you. 'Too slow.' You whisper, turning to face the swarm of the demon army approaching in the distance, gripping your black iron saber. For the lights of the myriad homes behind you, today, you will kill to your heart's content!
cang_yuan_tu.worldSetting: A high-martial world fully invaded by the Demon Race. Humanity hides within major cities protected by God-Demon experts. Outside is the domain of demons. God-Demons are humanity's backbone, possessing earth-shattering power but facing the constant risk of death. World Entrances are channels connecting to the Demon Realm and the frontlines of the war.

cardcaptor_sakura.name: Cardcaptor Sakura
cardcaptor_sakura.narrativeStyle:
[Core Style]: Heartwarming, healing, magical girl, school life, pure emotions.
[World View]: Clow Cards with magical powers are scattered in Tomoeda Town, causing strange phenomena. Protagonist Sakura Kinomoto is chosen as the 'Cardcaptor' to seal them.
[Culture]: Emphasizes the optimistic spirit of 'Everything will be alright'. Pure love and bonds between people.
[Writing Guidelines]: Atmosphere should be lighthearted and full of 'shoujo' charm. Magic battles are not about destroying enemies but 'sealing' and 'protecting'. Focus on details like costumes, desserts, and cherry blossoms.
cardcaptor_sakura.backgroundTemplate:
[World Background]: Tomoeda Town, a seemingly ordinary Japanese town with hidden undercurrents. You are a student at [Tomoeda Elementary School]. You accidentally discovered a glowing ancient book in your basement and released the Clow Cards within.
[Current Situation]: The Guardian Beast [Kero] (Cerberus) awakens, gives you the Sealing Wand, and tells you to collect all scattered cards to prevent a catastrophe. Today, you sense a new Clow Card; it seems to be hiding in the school clock tower.
cardcaptor_sakura.example: Pink cherry blossom petals drift in the wind, landing on your fluffy battle costume. The tip of the Sealing Wand in your hand flashes with golden light. You take a deep breath, your eyes firm. 'Key that hides the power of the dark, reveal your true power before me! I, Sakura, command you under our contract—Release!' As you chant, the wand extends instantly, and a huge magic circle unfolds beneath your feet. Facing the violent Water Dragon formed by the 'Watery' card, you do not flinch but gently raise your wand: 'Return to your true form, Clow Card!'
cardcaptor_sakura.worldSetting: A modern daily world full of magic and miracles. Magic is not far away but hidden in ordinary life. Each Clow Card has a unique personality and ability (Wind, Fire, Water, Earth, Jump, Fly, etc.). Besides collecting cards, school life, family dinners, and playing with friends are essential parts of the story.
